import React, { useEffect, useState } from "react"; import Sidebar from "../../components/Sidebar"; import API from "../../api/api"; const FreelancerDashboard = () => { const [stats,setStats] = useState({ projects:[], earnings:52000, rating:4.9, pending:0 }); useEffect(()=>{ fetchDashboard(); },[]) const fetchDashboard = async()=>{ try{ const projectsRes = await API.get("/projects"); const proposalsRes = await API.get("/proposals/freelancer/my-proposals"); setStats({ projects:projectsRes.data, earnings:52000, rating:4.9, pending:proposalsRes.data.filter(p=>p.status==="pending").length }) }catch(err){ console.log(err) } } return(

Dashboard

{/* TOP CARDS */}
{/* Active Projects */}

Active Projects

{stats.projects.length}

+1 new

{/* Earnings */}

Total Earnings

${stats.earnings}

+15% this month

{/* Rating */}

Avg Rating

{stats.rating}

Top 5%

{/* Pending */}

Pending Proposals

{stats.pending}

3 viewed

{/* ACTIVE PROJECTS */}

Active Projects

{stats.projects.map(project=>(

{project.title}

{project.description}

${project.budget} in-progress
))}
{/* PROFILE COMPLETION */}

Profile Completion

Basic Info

Portfolio

Skills

Certifications

) } export default FreelancerDashboard
